name: Crime Scene Kitchen
overview: A culinary guessing game in which bakers are tasked with decoding what type of dessert was made when all that’s left are the crumbs, flour trails, and a few elusive clues. They must then recreate the recipe for celebrity judges who will determine how closely their sweet treat matches the missing dessert.

trailers.title: Preview: Can You Guess What's Been Baked? | Season 1 | CRIME SCENE KITCHEN
